'''âf-l-k-z''' ('''kafalkezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wene|wene]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wene|wene]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-l-k-z
|-
! Lemma
| kafalkezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifalkezoko|thifalkezoko]] || [[word:jifalkezoko|jifalkezoko]] || [[word:shifalkezoko|shifalkezoko]] || [[word:kifalkezoko|kifalkezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufalkezoko|thuthufalkezoko]] || [[word:jujufalkezoko|jujufalkezoko]] || [[word:shushufalkezoko|shushufalkezoko]] || [[word:kukufalkezoko|kukufalkezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofalkezoko|thofalkezoko]] || [[word:jofalkezoko|jofalkezoko]] || [[word:shofalkezoko|shofalkezoko]] || [[word:kofalkezoko|kofalkezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
